_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: SinusBot 1.1 - Cage
author: cage@darkycage.com
description: SinusBot 1.1 for TeamSpeak using Cage's custom runtime image and developer-provided build.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SINUSBOT_URL="https://github.com/DarkyCage/cage-ptero-eggs/releases/download/v1.1/sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2"
TS_VERSION="3.5.6"
TS_URL="https://files.teamspeak-services.com/releases/client/${TS_VERSION}/TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64-${TS_VERSION}.run"
YTDLP_URL="https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp"

apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    bzip2 \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    tar \
    wget
apt-get clean
rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

cd /mnt/server

rm -rf TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64
rm -rf data/ts3
rm -f teamspeak-client.run sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2

mkdir -p TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/plugins
mkdir -p youtube-dlp

echo "Downloading SinusBot 1.1..."
wget --progress=dot:giga --tries=3 \
    -O sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2 \
    "${SINUSBOT_URL}"

test -s sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2

echo "Extracting SinusBot..."
tar -xjf sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2
rm -f sinusbot1.1.tar.bz2

echo "Downloading TeamSpeak Client ${TS_VERSION}..."
wget --progress=dot:giga --tries=3 \
    -O teamspeak-client.run \
    "${TS_URL}"

chmod 0755 teamspeak-client.run
./teamspeak-client.run --tar xfv -C TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64
rm -f teamspeak-client.run

rm -f TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/xcbglintegrations/libqxcb-glx-integration.so

if [ ! -x ./sinusbot ]; then
    chmod 0755 ./sinusbot
fi

if [ -f ./ttshlpr ]; then
    chmod 0755 ./ttshlpr
fi

if [ ! -f config.ini ]; then
    cp config.ini.dist config.ini
fi

if grep -q '^TS3Path' config.ini; then
    sed -i 's|^TS3Path.*|TS3Path = "/home/container/TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/ts3client_linux_amd64"|' config.ini
else
    echo 'TS3Path = "/home/container/TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/ts3client_linux_amd64"' >> config.ini
fi

if grep -q '^YoutubeDLPath' config.ini; then
    sed -i 's|^YoutubeDLPath.*|YoutubeDLPath = "/home/container/youtube-dlp/yt-dlp"|' config.ini
else
    echo 'YoutubeDLPath = "/home/container/youtube-dlp/yt-dlp"' >> config.ini
fi

if [ ! -f plugin/libsoundbot_plugin.so ]; then
    echo "ERROR: plugin/libsoundbot_plugin.so is missing from the SinusBot archive."
    exit 1
fi

cp -f plugin/libsoundbot_plugin.so \
    TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/plugins/libsoundbot_plugin.so

chmod 0755 TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/plugins/libsoundbot_plugin.so

echo "Downloading yt-dlp..."
wget --progress=dot:giga --tries=3 \
    -O youtube-dlp/yt-dlp \
    "${YTDLP_URL}"
chmod 0755 youtube-dlp/yt-dlp

echo "Verifying installation..."
test -x ./sinusbot
test -x TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/ts3client_linux_amd64
test -f TeamSpeak3-Client-linux_amd64/plugins/libsoundbot_plugin.so
test -x youtube-dlp/yt-dlp

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "SinusBot 1.1 installation completed"
echo "TeamSpeak Client: ${TS_VERSION}"
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Administrator Password
variables.description: Password assigned to the SinusBot administrator account during startup.
